hooks.command:
bash -c '
cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command" 2>/dev/null)
if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git +push"; then
  branch=$(git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null)
  case "$branch" in
    main|staging|release/*)
      echo "{\"continue\": false, \"stopReason\": \"Direct pushes to $branch are not allowed. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feat/<name>\"}"
      exit 1
      ;;
  esac
fi
'
